name: Starchild Strategy Library
description: Curated trading strategies for Starchild agents. Organized by trading style so agents can navigate from broad category to specific strategy.

mean-reversion.label: mean reversion
mean-reversion.description: Strategies that bet on prices returning to a historical norm. Best in range-bound, choppy markets. Underperform during sustained trends.

strategies.name: rsi reversal
strategies.summary: Long oversold assets, short overbought assets using RSI thresholds. Mean reversion, daily timeframe.

strategies.name: zscore reversion
strategies.summary: Statistical pairs trading on z-score deviation between two correlated assets. Enter at extremes, exit at mean.

strategies.name: convergence trade
strategies.summary: Pairs trading on correlated assets that diverge beyond 2 standard deviations. Market-neutral when balanced.

momentum.label: momentum and trend
momentum.description: Strategies that follow price direction. Best in trending markets with clear directional moves. Underperform in sideways chop.

strategies.name: rsi rotation
strategies.summary: Ranks assets by momentum over 3-6 months. Long the leaders, short the laggards. Monthly rebalance.

strategies.name: volatility breakout
strategies.summary: Enters positions after periods of compressed volatility. Catches the start of big moves.

strategies.name: gap continuation
strategies.summary: Trades continuation after large opening gaps confirmed by volume. Intraday timeframe.

market-neutral.label: market neutral and yield
market-neutral.description: Strategies with zero or near-zero directional exposure. Profit from structural inefficiencies rather than price direction. Lower returns but more consistent.

strategies.name: grid bot
strategies.summary: Places buy/sell limit orders at fixed intervals across a price range. Profits from oscillation.

strategies.name: funding rate arbitrage
strategies.summary: Delta-neutral cross-venue funding rate capture. Short high-funding venue, long low-funding venue.

strategies.name: overnight drift
strategies.summary: Captures returns during low-volume overnight sessions. Exploits quiet-hours drift patterns.

complexity_levels.beginner: Few parameters, single asset or simple logic. Good starting point.
complexity_levels.intermediate: Multiple parameters, multi-asset or statistical concepts. Requires some trading knowledge.
complexity_levels.advanced: Cross-venue, multi-leg, or complex risk management. Requires understanding of market microstructure.

meta.usage: Load this catalog first. Browse categories by trading style. Load individual strategy files only when the user selects one or describes intent that matches.
